steps.title: Translate the point structure
steps.content: Each draw earns 1 point, so $d$ draws yield $1 \cdot d = d$ points. Each win earns 4 points, so $w$ wins yield $4 \cdot w = 4w$ points.

steps.title: Form the total equation
steps.content:
Total points = points from draws + points from wins = 46:
$$d + 4w = 46$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $d + 4w = 46$ — 1 point per draw and 4 per win, matching the problem. Correct.
  • B) $4d + w = 46$ — swaps the point values, giving draws 4 points and wins 1 point. Wrong.
  • C) $d + \frac{w}{4} = 46$ — divides wins by 4 instead of multiplying. Wrong.
  • D) $\frac{d}{4} + w = 46$ — divides draws by 4 and gives only 1 point per win. Wrong.
That confirms A is correct.
